kill_if.discovered_not_indexed_worsens: Ratio worsens significantly → PAUSE, fix, KILL if no improvement in 14 days
kill_if.no_impressions: 0 impressions 30 days after indexing → KILL (no demand)
kill_if.near_duplicate: Google treats as duplicate → KILL low performers
kill_if.gsc_quality_decline: Quality signals drop → PAUSE all, audit
kill_if.cannibalization: Money pages lose traffic → KILL cannibalizers

double_down_if.clicks_appear: Any click is a scale signal
double_down_if.parent_pages_gain: Money pages gain from database support
